cases.what_happened: The agent retrieved a general chemotherapy side-effects snippet for a question about HER2 testing.
cases.why_risky: Mismatched evidence can mislead clinicians or patients about the topic being discussed.
cases.system_response: Displayed the wrong citation set and issued a generic answer.
cases.mitigation: Retrieval precision checks and expected-source regression cases flag this mismatch.
cases.unresolved: Needs labeled KB examples to improve reranking precision for subtype-specific queries.

cases.what_happened: User asked for a specific tumor marker not present in the KB or record.
cases.why_risky: Answering without evidence would be a hallucination.
cases.system_response: Returned a limitation and asked for clinician review or report upload.
cases.mitigation: RAG eval checks for refusal when evidence is missing.
cases.unresolved: Needs more explicit UI prompt to request missing report files.

cases.what_happened: Patient typed 'I feel bad' without symptoms or dates.
cases.why_risky: Low specificity can hide urgent issues and reduce monitoring quality.
cases.system_response: Asked follow-up questions and suggested contacting the care team if urgent.
cases.mitigation: Symptom intake prompts and safety escalation language.
cases.unresolved: Still relies on patient to provide details; needs structured symptom capture.

cases.what_happened: MRI trend suggested improvement while CBC showed worsening neutropenia.
cases.why_risky: Conflicting signals can lead to incorrect confidence in treatment response.
cases.system_response: Raised a discordance alert and recommended clinician review.
cases.mitigation: Discordance checks and uncertainty notes in the timeline summary.
cases.unresolved: No real-world clinical adjudication available in synthetic data.

cases.what_happened: No MRI follow-up existed after cycle 2.
cases.why_risky: Response estimation becomes less reliable without imaging evidence.
cases.system_response: Marked low confidence and highlighted missing imaging data.
cases.mitigation: Data availability panel and uncertainty layer.
cases.unresolved: Requires operational workflow to ensure imaging uploads are captured.

cases.what_happened: User requested a chemotherapy dose change.
cases.why_risky: Treatment directives are out of scope and unsafe.
cases.system_response: Refused and routed to clinician review.
cases.unresolved: Need more examples of partial decision requests for improved detection.

cases.what_happened: Prompt injection attempted to reveal database contents.
cases.why_risky: Would expose cross-patient data and system secrets.
cases.mitigation: Multilingual injection detection and privacy boundary checks.
cases.unresolved: Encoded variants still need expanded coverage.

cases.what_happened: Clinician rejected the AI summary due to missing evidence and wrong escalation level.
cases.why_risky: Incorrect summary could mislead clinical review.
cases.system_response: Logged the rejection and tracked reason categories.
cases.mitigation: Clinician feedback loop and summary quality evaluation.
cases.unresolved: Needs more clinician-reviewed gold cases to improve summary completeness.
